case_title: JOSE EVARISTO MENDOZA MELENDEZ VS. GABRIEL ANTONIO MIRANDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY MENDOZA MELENDEZ, JOSE EVARISTO AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, GABRIEL ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENDOZA MELENDEZ, JOSE EVARISTO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-25-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, GABRIEL ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA MELENDEZ, JOSE EVARISTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRANDA, GABRIEL ANTONIO $700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
